content:
Phase 4.1 – Request flow completion + language sync + OTP email branding + profile avatar upload + permissions + motion polish + bug fixing

You are working on the existing Heavyar Expo / React Native app with Firebase, Firestore, Cloudinary, Resend, and Cloudflare Worker backend.

IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT refactor unrelated code
- Do NOT break existing working flows
- Keep changes incremental and production-safe
- Keep Arabic as default, English supported
- RTL/LTR must remain correct
- Reuse the current architecture where possible
- Push all changes to GitHub after completion

==================================================
PART 1 – REQUEST FLOW: RENTAL DAYS / OPEN-ENDED WORK
==================================================

Current issue:
Request creation is too limited and currently uses a fixed rental period.

Required behavior:
1. When a customer requests equipment, allow choosing between:
   - fixed number of days
   - open-ended until work completion

2. Add request mode field:
   - requestMode: "fixed_days" | "open_ended"

3. If fixed_days:
   - user must enter numberOfDays
   - validate numberOfDays > 0

4. If open_ended:
   - no numberOfDays required

5. Update Firestore request structure safely to include:
   - requestMode
   - numberOfDays (nullable)
   - optional note/message if useful and already supported cleanly

6. Update request creation UI accordingly

7. Update customer/provider request cards and request details to display:
   - fixed days clearly
   - or "Until work completion" / Arabic equivalent

8. Ensure pricing logic remains safe:
   - if fixed_days, calculate based on pricePerDay × numberOfDays
   - if open_ended, do not fake final total incorrectly
   - use a clean pending/estimated style if needed

==================================================
PART 2 – FIX REQUEST CREATION BUG
==================================================

Current issue:
When requesting equipment, the app shows an error dialog.

Your task:
1. Trace the real root cause end-to-end:
   - frontend request action
   - Firestore write
   - validation
   - current rules compatibility
   - any missing fields due to the new request flow
2. Fix the bug completely
3. Remove any raw debug/toast leakage such as:
   - [EquipmentDetail] Request error: ...
4. Keep user-facing error messages clean and localized

==================================================
PART 3 – LANGUAGE SELECTOR BEFORE LOGIN
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Add a global language selector visible before login/registration
2. Use a clear world/globe icon for language
3. It must appear for guest users too
4. User can switch Arabic / English before creating account
5. The selected language must immediately affect:
   - app UI
   - OTP flow UI
   - email OTP language
6. Persist language selection locally so app remembers it

==================================================
PART 4 – OTP EMAIL LANGUAGE + BRANDING
==================================================

Current issue:
OTP email is working, but needs to be more polished and synchronized with app language.

Required behavior:
1. OTP email content must follow the currently selected user language
   - Arabic email if app/user language is Arabic
   - English email if app/user language is English

2. Include the Heavyar app icon/logo at the top of the email for branding
   - use the provided app icon asset if available in the project/current assets
   - if the exact icon file must be referenced, use the project’s actual app icon source
   - do not fake branding; use the real Heavyar icon asset

3. Keep the email design clean and premium:
   - logo/icon at top
   - app name
   - clear verification code
   - expiration note
   - ignore message

4. Keep sender domain as the verified Resend sender already fixed:
   - noreply@mail.heavyar.com

5. Ensure no raw backend/internal error text leaks to the user if send fails

==================================================
PART 5 – PROFILE AVATAR UPLOAD
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Allow user to choose profile image from device gallery
2. Upload avatar image to Cloudinary
3. Save avatar URL (and publicId if useful for later cleanup) in the user profile
4. Show avatar in profile and relevant user cards if already supported
5. Keep upload secure and consistent with the existing Cloudinary flow
6. If avatar is replaced, clean up the old Cloudinary asset safely if possible

==================================================
PART 6 – PERMISSIONS
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Ask for notification permission when appropriate in app startup flow
2. Ask for media library/gallery permission when user wants to pick profile image
3. Keep permission UX professional and not annoying
4. Do NOT request unrelated permissions
5. If notifications infrastructure is not fully implemented yet, at least prepare the permission flow cleanly without fake functionality

==================================================
PART 7 – MOTION / TRANSITIONS POLISH
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Improve motion smoothness across key navigation flows
2. Keep transitions subtle and professional
3. Focus on:
   - screen transitions
   - modal/dialog appearance
   - request/payment/profile flows
4. Do NOT introduce heavy animation libraries unless already present or absolutely necessary
5. Do not hurt performance on Android devices

==================================================
PART 8 – UX / TEXT QUALITY
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Clean all user-facing request-related messages
2. Ensure no corrupted text remains
3. Ensure Arabic and English strings are polished
4. Keep dialogs consistent with the current premium dialog style

==================================================
PART 9 – DATA / RULES COMPATIBILITY
==================================================

Required behavior:
1. Ensure all new request fields remain compatible with existing Firestore rules
2. If Firestore rules must be updated because of:
   - requestMode
   - numberOfDays
   - avatar profile fields
then clearly state the exact rule changes needed
3. Do not silently break request creation due to schema mismatch

==================================================
PART 10 – ELECTRONIC INVOICE EMAIL (SAUDI COMPLIANT STYLE)
==================================================

Goal:
Send a professional electronic invoice via email (not PDF) after successful payment.

Requirements:

1. Invoice must be sent via email automatically after successful payment verification.

2. Email must be highly professional and branded:
   - Include Heavyar logo at the top
   - Clean structured layout (not plain text)
   - Use styled HTML email

3. Company information (must be included clearly):
   - Name: مؤسسة سالم بن علي النعيمي
   - CR Number: 7050191290

4. Address (use formatted version):
   - Ahmad Ibn Hajar Al Asqalani Street
   - Building No: 2500
   - Secondary No: 9074
   - District: Tebah
   - Postal Code: 35513
   - City: Al Jubail
   - Saudi Arabia

5. Customer information:
   - Email
   - (optional name if available)

6. Invoice content:
   - Invoice number (unique)
   - Issue date
   - Equipment name
   - Rental type:
     - fixed days OR open-ended
   - Number of days if applicable
   - Price per day
   - Subtotal
   - VAT (15%)
   - Total including VAT

7. Currency formatting:
   - Display Saudi Riyal using modern format:
     - "﷼" symbol if supported
     - otherwise "SAR"
   - Format numbers cleanly

8. VAT requirements (important):
   - Clearly show VAT 15%
   - Show subtotal and VAT separately
   - Show total including VAT
   - Add note:
     - Arabic: "فاتورة ضريبية مبسطة"
     - English: "Simplified Tax Invoice"

9. Language:
   - Email must match user's selected language (Arabic / English)
   - Fully translated template (not mixed)

10. Styling:
   - Dark + gold branding (match app theme)
   - Clean spacing
   - Large total amount
   - Clear sections

11. Do NOT generate PDF
   - Email itself is the invoice

12. Backend:
   - Trigger email from Worker after successful payment verification
   - Use existing RESEND_API_KEY

13. Do NOT expose sensitive keys

==================================================

==================================================
PART 11 – USE PROVIDED LOGO AS OFFICIAL BRAND ASSET
==================================================

Context:
A file named "logo.png" has been uploaded and must be used as the official Heavyar brand logo.

Requirements:

1. Use "logo.png" as the primary brand logo everywhere branding is required:
   - OTP email template
   - Electronic invoice email
   - Any future branded email content

2. Do NOT use placeholder logos or emojis
3. Do NOT fetch external logos
4. Do NOT hardcode fake URLs

5. Proper handling:
   - Ensure the logo is accessible in the email context (host if necessary using a safe method such as Cloudinary or a public asset path)
   - Use a stable public URL so it renders correctly in email clients

6. Email design rules:
   - Logo must appear at the top center
   - Proper spacing above and below
   - Scaled professionally (not too large, not blurry)

7. Maintain consistency:
   - Same logo used across OTP + invoice emails
   - Same color theme alignment (dark + gold branding)

8. Fail-safe:
   - If logo fails to load, fallback to app name "Heavyar" (no broken image icons)

Do not modify unrelated assets.

==================================================


==================================================
FINAL VERIFICATION
==================================================

Before finishing, verify all of the following:

1. Customer can request equipment with:
   - fixed days
   - open-ended mode

2. Request creation no longer throws the current error

3. Language selector is visible before login

4. App language changes immediately and persists

5. OTP email language matches selected language

6. OTP email includes the Heavyar icon/logo

7. Profile image can be selected from gallery and uploaded successfully

8. Relevant permissions behave correctly

9. Motion/transitions feel smoother without breaking performance

10. No existing working flow was broken:
   - login
   - registration
   - OTP verification
   - listing creation/editing/deletion
   - requests
   - payment
   - invoices

Commit message:
Phase 4.1: request flow + language sync + OTP email branding + avatar upload + permissions + motion polish

Push to GitHub after completion.

Return:
1. Exact files changed
2. Root cause of the request error
3. How request duration modes were implemented
4. How OTP email language sync works
5. How the app icon was included in the email
6. How avatar upload works
7. Any Firestore rule changes needed
8. Any remaining limitation, if any
